description: CompositionGrey full length formal trousers made of 100% cotton, has flat front with two pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back, brand patch above the right hip pocket, metal zipper and button closure, and reinforced stitch detailing along the crotch area and the hemlineFittingSlimWash careMachine wash coldWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry lowWarm ironA famous saying goes - "A man's class is raised by a bar with the trousers he wears". The man of substance always chooses his formal trousers with much care, and scullers makes it all the more easier with its classsy range of formal trousers. Designed with the choicest of selected fabrics, it makes for a perfect daily office wear. Pair it with classic formal shirts and leather shoes to look every bit like the corporate that you are.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 41.5"Height-6.1", waist-31"
